howTit: Three steps to a complete coaching system

steps.d: Set up your coaching parameters in 5 minutes — no technical knowledge needed, no long manuals to read.
Send the client a link. They download the app and instantly see all their plans — you never have to send anything manually again.
Check-ins arrive automatically, payments are visible in seconds, and you have more time for actual coaching.

mobSub: The coach tracks everything from their phone. The client has their own app with plans, check-ins and chat.

mobFeats.d: See check-ins, payments and messages from every client on your phone. Add the app to your home screen and track everything on the go.
Client opens the app, fills in the check-in and saves. You instantly see their progress — without a single message.
All client messages in one place. No more messy WhatsApp conversations and lost messages.

testimonials.q: Finally one place for everything. Before I used WhatsApp, Excel and a bunch of random apps — now everything is in one place and I save an hour a day.
testimonials.name: Mark K.

testimonials.q: I went from 8 to 15 clients without extra stress. The check-in system automatically reminds clients and I immediately see who's late submitting.

faqs.q: Is a credit card required to register?
faqs.a: Yes, a card is required to activate the trial period, but you are not charged immediately. Try UnitLift free for 14 days — billing only starts after the trial ends if you choose to continue. You can cancel at any time with no penalties or hidden fees.

faqs.q: Do my clients have to pay for the app?
faqs.a: No. The client mobile app is completely free to download and use on iOS and Android devices. The client just downloads the app, you send them access, and they instantly see plans, submit check-ins and chat with you — at no cost to the client.

Less than 5 minutes. Registration is fast and intuitive — set up your profile, customize parameters and invite your first client the same day. No long manuals or technical knowledge needed — if you can use a smartphone, you can use UnitLift.

faqs.q: Does UnitLift work on mobile for coaches?
faqs.a: Yes. The web app is fully responsive and you can add it to your phone's home screen as an app. Clients have a dedicated native iOS and Android app optimized for daily use — viewing plans, submitting check-ins and direct chat with their coach.

faqs.q: Can I have my own logo and colors?
faqs.a: Yes, branding is available on Pro and Scale plans. In settings, add your logo, choose primary colors and connect your social media profiles. Clients will then see your brand instead of UnitLift's — looks more professional and builds trust in you as a coach.

faqs.q: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
faqs.a: Yes, with no penalties or hidden fees. You can cancel at any time from your account settings — no deadlines and no explanation needed. Access remains active until the end of the paid period.

seoPage.heroH1: Software that replaces WhatsApp and Excel
seoPage.heroSub: UnitLift is a platform for online personal trainers. Training plans, nutrition, weekly check-ins and payment tracking — all on one screen. More clients, without more chaos.
seoPage.heroNote: Card required for activation · No charge for 14 days · Cancel anytime
seoPage.problemH2:
Online coaching without proper software
is chaos that compounds
seoPage.problemSub: Messages on WhatsApp, plans in Excel, payments on paper — it works with 5 clients. At 15, you start losing track of things.

problemCards.title: WhatsApp as a "system"
problemCards.text: Training plans are sent as photos or PDFs. The client can't find an older plan. You don't know if they even saw the new one.

problemCards.title: Excel for client tracking
problemCards.text: A spreadsheet with names, dates and notes. You manually enter every check-in. You lose an hour a week on copy-paste that solves nothing.

problemCards.title: Payments without a system
problemCards.text: Who paid this month? Whose subscription is expiring soon? Without a clear system — you don't know, or you forget to ask. Money stays on the table.

seoPage.featSub: UnitLift centralizes everything a coach needs into one web platform — with a free mobile app for clients included.

features.title: Training and nutrition plans
features.desc: Create personalized plans for each client. They see them instantly in the app — no PDFs, no sending over WhatsApp.

features.title: Weekly check-in system
features.desc: A client fills in a check-in in 2 minutes from their phone. You immediately see progress, measurements and photos — all archived automatically.

features.title: Integrated chat
features.desc: All messages with clients in one place. No more tangled WhatsApp threads and lost messages about workouts.

features.title: Payment tracking
features.desc: See exactly who paid, who's late and how much you earned this month. No manual tracking, no awkward situations.

features.title: Mobile app for clients
features.desc: Clients download the free iOS/Android app and instantly have access to their plans. More professional than any PDF.

seoPage.usecaseH2: Built for online fitness coaches of all kinds

usecases.title: Personal trainer going online
usecases.text: You have 10–20 clients and have been getting by with WhatsApp. You want to look more professional and stop wasting an hour a day on admin. UnitLift is ready in 5 minutes.

usecases.title: Strength coach scaling up
usecases.text: You have 30–50 clients and manual tracking no longer works. You need a system that automatically sends check-in reminders and clearly shows who has paid.

usecases.title: Nutritionist adding coaching
usecases.text: You make nutrition plans and need a system where the client sees their macros, logs progress and communicates with you — without 4 different apps and confused clients.

faqs.q: What is the difference between UnitLift and Trainerize?
faqs.a: Trainerize is a complex platform in English, designed for larger coaching operations. UnitLift is simpler, available in Croatian, with transparent pricing and no hidden add-ons — and ready to use in 5 minutes.

faqs.q: Do my clients have to pay for the app?
faqs.a: No. The client mobile app is completely free to download and use on iOS and Android. The coach pays the subscription; the client pays nothing to access the platform.

faqs.q: How quickly can I start using UnitLift?
faqs.a: Less than 5 minutes. Registration is fast and intuitive — set up your profile, adjust your parameters and invite your first client the same day. No long manuals, no technical knowledge needed.

faqs.q: Can I try UnitLift without being charged?
faqs.a: Yes. All plans include a 14-day free trial. A card is required for activation, but billing only starts after the trial ends. You can cancel at any time with no penalties.

faqs.q: Does UnitLift work on mobile for coaches?
faqs.a: Yes. The coach web app is fully responsive and can be added to your phone's home screen as an app. Clients have a separate native iOS and Android app optimized for daily use.
